titleStmt.title: SII 16.295: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 295. (A.R. No. 270 of 1916.) ŚRĪMUSHṆAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west wall of the first prākāra of the Bhūvarāha-perumāḷ temple.
This is dated Śaka 1505, Svabhānu, Māgha śu. 7, corresponding to 1584 A.D., January 9, (Thursday).

The record states that the Śrībhaṇḍāraṁvāru of the Ādivarāhasvāmin temple gave to Achyutappa-nāyaka, son of Bayyappa-nāyaka and grandson of Timmi-nāyaka of Udayagiri, a fourth share in the offerings made to the god, a share in the administration of the temple affairs, the talārikam over the temple villages as also the tirumēnikāval duties as kāṇāchi (kāṇiyāṭchi) to be held hereiditarily in response to his having made a representation to Koṇḍama-nāyaka, son of Kṛishṇappa-nāyaka and obtained remission of the jōḍi, virāḍa and other taxes on 38 villages (enumerated) inclusive of those in his (Koṇḍama-nāyaka's) nāyaṅkara territory that he had endowed to the temple, and for his having at his own cost cleared (the villages of) the jungle and brought the lands under cultivation, built tanks, dug canals, planted groves, provided golden ornaments set with precious stones to the god, made some images of silver and gold, some vessels, golden vāhanas and other accoutrements and built the various gōpuras, maṇḍapas and prākāras in addition to renovating the temple and finally made over his own share of the sthala-suṅkam for the seasonal processions and other provisions in the temple. Also gives an elaborate list of 24 kinds of dishes to be offered to the god in the names of the king, the three Nāyakas viz., Koṇḍama, Achyutappa and Kṛishṇappa, and Kōnēṭamma and Vōbuḷamma. Cf. No. 294 above.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatē rāmānujāya namaḥ . svastiśrī vijayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1505 Agunēṁṭi svabhānusaṁvatsara māgha śu 7 lu śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīra śrīraṁggarāyadēvamahārāyaluṁgāru penugoṁḍa nagaramaṁ
du ratnasiṁhvāsanārūḍhulai pṛthivisāmrājyaṁ cēyucunnuṁḍaṁgānu śrīmadakhilāṁḍa kōṭibraṁhmāṁḍanāyakulaina śrīmuṣṇaṁ Ādivarāhaperumāḷa kōvila śrībhaṁḍāraṁ vāru kāsyapagōtraṁ vudayagiri timmināyaniṁgāri pautrulu bayyappanāyaniṁgāri putrulu
Acyutappanāyaniṁgāriki Iccina śāsanakramaṁ yeṭlannanu mīru Ādivarāhaperumāḷaku vurasthalaṁ nācārula vēṁcēyiṁppaṁjēsi mī nāyaṁkarānaku naḍacē śīmalalōni vullūru cellūru Ākāśaṁbaṭṭu sāḷuvanallūru rājēṁdrapaṭnaṁ kiḷimaṁgalaṁ grāmālunnu Aḍavi narakiṁci
krottagā kāviṁcina grāmālu bayyasamudraṁ raṁgamammasamudraṁ kṛṣṇāpuraṁ divvasamudraṁ mēlēAcyutāpuraṁ kīḷeAcyutāpuraṁ grāmālunnu mīru krayaṁgonna Agrahārālu kōḷuguḍi cirunōḷa grāmālunnu Ādivarāha perumāḷaku
sama¨rpiṁci koṁḍamanāyanivāriki telupukoni nagariki jōḍi virāḍālu Accēpūrvapu grāmālu tirumuṭṭaṁputtūru kaḷakōḍi kīḷekāriguḍivalaṁ śirāman nāgaṁbaṁdalu kunna maṁgalaṁ yeḷamaṁgalaṁ pūṁḍi kōlavarāhanalūru rāyaṁgan puḷiyaṁguḍi koḷitaṁgā
vankāri maruguḍi cakramaṁgalaṁ kiṇanūru tirukunnaṁ naidhirvēli paḷayāṁtāṁgalu vuḷuttu kuppa kiḷānallūru paṇayaṁbaḷi cittagaraṁ koḍiyālaṁ grāmālakunnu vaḍaguḍi kaḍukā maraṁ kurici nāgaṁguḍi grāmālu 4ki perumāḷakōvila samaṁdhaṁ sagamaṭikinni vuḷka ḍalu paṇniḍaḷaṁ vaḷa
yamādēvi tirumālepuraṁ muruṁgūritōpu kāvanūritōpu yeḷegālumaḍugu yeddupaṭṭu Ayaṁ yaḍatovuḷūritōpu modalainaṁdulaku jōḍi virāḍa karaṇika talārikāluṁ sahā sarvamānyaṁgānu mīru viḍupiṁcukoni sthaḷaṁ saṁttasuṁkhālu tarugā sahā perumāḷaku sama¨rpiṁci
mī cētidhanaṁ beṭṭi Aḍavinarakiṁci polaṁdī¨rpiṁci yēṭi kāluvalu ceruvulu tavviṁci topulu vēyiṁci perumāḷlaku ratnabhaṁgārālu Ādigāgala sakalamaina tiruvābharaṇālunnu veṁḍi paiṁḍisvarūpālu paṁcapātralu śaṭhagōpaṁ tirumaṁjenabiṁddelu Āragiṁputaḷigelu bhaṁgāru vāhanālu tiruvin
jāmaralu kuṁbhā¨rti paṁjulu goḍugula ṭekkelu tirutē¨rlu gōpuraprākāra maṁḍḍapālu cuṭṭukōvilalu mōdalaina tirupaṇulu cēIṁci pallakiśāva maḷavāḷavigrahaṁ śūḍi koḍuttanācā¨rlu Āḷuvā¨rlanunnu vēṁcēyiṁpajēśi svāmiki Āragiṁpu kaṭṭaḍalu dinaṁ 1ki Āmudupaḷu ka 513ki dadhyōdanamu
taḷigelu 4 pakāḷabhātu taḷigelu 2 poṁgali taḷigalu 2 puḷivōgara taḷigalu 2 kaḍugu vōgara taḷigalu 2 yeḷuvōgara taḷigalu 2 vuḷuṁdu vōgara taḷigalu 2 tiruviṇaṁ taḷigalu 2 tirukaṇāmudu taḷigalu 2 celvaru saṁbā taḷigalu 2 kṣīrānnaṁ taḷigalu 2 Akkālapāyasaṁ taḷigalu 2 tirupannerālu Atirasālu 51
Aṁtarasālu 51 Apālu 51 sukhiyalu 51 tēnetolalu 51 vaḍalu 51 Iḍḍina 51 dōśalu 51 manōharaṁ 51 poriviḷāṁgāI 51 carimiḍi 51 pūraṇapu kuḍumulu 51 gunukulu 51 Amṛtakalaśālu 51 Amṛtaguḷikalu 51 yeḷuṁḍalu 51 karijakāyalu 51 vennaṭlu 51 baṭṭuta
vobbaṭlu 51 cakkilālu 51 Āppaḷaṁ 51 nārasattulu 82 khaṁḍasakira 2 Aṁtu pannara vagalu 24 rāyala Avasaraṁ taligelu 72 koṁḍamanāyani Avasaraṁ taḷigeḷu 72 Accutappanāyani Avasaraṁ taḷigalu 275 kṛiṣṇappanāyani Avasaraṁ taḷigalu 60 kōnē ṭammavāri Avasaraṁ taḷiga 48
vōbuḷammavāri Avasaraṁ taḷigalu 42 Aṁttu taḷigalu 569 parupu kariyamudulu cā¨rlu tayiru mō¨rlu śikhararasāyanālu Ānavālu neyi nūne dhārōṣṇālu Ādigāgala Āragiṁpu kaṭṭaḷlunnu caṁdanaṁ ĀḍikāAmudu tirumaṁjanaṁ tiruviḷaku kaṭṭika tirumāle kaṭṭaḍa sahā mī vubha
yamugānu kaṭṭaḍaśēśi Aṁgaraṁgavaibhavālaku mēḷālu 12 nnu pātralu 360 mānisini krayamugoni kaṭṭaḍaśēśi nityōtsava mahōtsava rathōtsavālunnu nityapuṣkaraṇī mōdalayina tī¨rthaparipālanamunnu śēśi śrīmuṣṇasthalaṁ jī¨rṇōddhāraṇaṁ śēstiri ganaka perumāḷlu Āragiṁcina padā¨rthālu
Avadhariṁcina caṁdanamu mōdalayina Anniṭānu Ādimū¨rti prasādalabdaṁgānu viṭṭavanviḷu kāḍu cetu¨rthāṁśānakugala svāmyālunnu sakalavidha kaiṁkariyālunnuśēśi sthalaṁ vuddhariṁ stira ganaka sthānanirvāhālavāritōḍaṭṭu mīku voka nirvāhamunnu voka saṁpratinni śrībhaṁḍāraṁ
vugrāṇālaku voka mudrānu tirumuṭṭapaṭnaṁvēṭa tiruviḷayāṭagrāmālu mōdalayina Aṁdulaku talārikamunu kōvila śrībhaṁḍāraṁ tirumēnikāvalani mīku yistimi ganaka yī kāṇāci mī putrapautrapāraṁpa
ryamugānu dānādi vinimaya vikrayayōgyaṁ Avunaṭṭugānu Ācaṁdrā¨rkasthāyigānu Anubhaviṁpaṁgalavāru yī paḍitaramutōkūḍānu vōbuḷammavāri caluvapaṁdaliki dinamu 1 ki biyyamu 3 vuluvalu 1 nnu kaṭṭaḍaśēsti
mi ganaka yī mariyādalu sakalamunnu tappaka naḍapagalavāramu Ani yiccina śāsanamu .
Digital edition of SII 16.295 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
